title: Reward Shaping
summary: Modifying the reward function to guide the agent's behavior towards a desired outcome. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Strategies. Start after Reward Models and Reward Function. It opens into Heuristic Reward Shaping and Reward Shaping in Robotics.
